name: IRC_MESSAGE_DETAIL_LOGS
description: This table logs all message details data for all communication channels that will help in debugging any issues in HCM Communicate and Recruiting.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_DETAIL_LOGS_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for the table. System generated.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the table IRC_MESSAGE_TRACKING.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: UMS SMTP message ID for email, Id sent by the provider for SMS, etc. Foreign key to the table IRC_INTERACTIONS.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_SUBJECT
columns.Comments: The subject for the message that was sent to the person.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_CONTENT
columns.Comments: The content of the message that was sent to the person.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_API_REQUEST
columns.Comments: Message API request details of the message sent.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_API_RESPONSE
columns.Comments: Message API response data of the message sent.

columns.Name: ERROR
columns.Comments: Details of any error that was encountered in sending out the message.

columns.Name: ADDITIONAL_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Stores the request details, including headers.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
